query:
SELECT id, name, description, category, country 
FROM grants 
WHERE description IS NULL 
   OR LENGTH(description) < 10
   OR description REGEXP '^[0-9$., ~]+$'
   OR name REGEXP '^[~$0-9., ]+$'
ORDER BY name
LIMIT 50;
command:

   OR name REGEXP '^[~$0-9., ]+$'
